requirement_topic.en: CONATEL Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (Ley 642/95 de Telecomunicaciones, CONATEL Resolutions)
requirement_topic.zh: CONATEL强制型式认可——无线电及电信终端设备型号认证（第642/95号电信法，CONATEL决议）
requirement_topic.zht: CONATEL強制型式認可——無線電及電信終端裝置型號認證（第642/95號電信法，CONATEL決議）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi routers, Bluetooth devices, IoT hubs, smart speakers, and any device incorporating wireless radio technology — must obtain a mandatory CONATEL homologación (type approval) certificate issued by the Comisión Nacional de Telecomunicaciones of Paraguay before import or sale in Paraguay. The legal basis is Ley 642/95 de Telecomunicaciones and implementing CONATEL resolutions. The homologación process requires submission of a technical dossier including laboratory test reports for radio (RF), EMC, and electrical safety; a product description and technical specifications; and documentation from the authorized Paraguayan importer or representative. CONATEL may accept CE or FCC test reports as a technical supporting basis within the dossier, but the CONATEL homologación certificate is a separate Paraguayan administrative act and is not replaced by CE, FCC, SRRC, or CCC approvals. The CONATEL seal must be affixed to the approved product. Note: Paraguay's CONATEL is distinct from Venezuela's similarly-named regulator. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is not recognised by CONATEL.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi路由器、蓝牙设备、物联网集线器、智能音箱及任何内置无线技术的设备——在巴拉圭进口或销售前，须取得由巴拉圭国家电信委员会（CONATEL）颁发的强制型式认可（homologación）证书。法律依据为1995年第642号电信法及实施性CONATEL决议。型式认可申请须提交技术文件，包括无线电（射频）、EMC和电气安全的实验室检测报告、产品描述及技术规格，以及授权巴拉圭进口商或代表的相关文件。CONATEL可接受CE或FCC检测报告作为文件包内的技术支撑依据，但CONATEL型式认可证书属独立的巴拉圭行政行为，不能由CE、FCC、SRRC或CCC核准替代。经认可产品须粘贴CONATEL标志。注意：巴拉圭的CONATEL与委内瑞拉的同名监管机构不同。CCC（中国强制认证）不被CONATEL承认。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi路由器、藍牙裝置、物聯網集線器、智慧音箱及任何內置無線技術的裝置——在巴拉圭進口或銷售前，須取得由巴拉圭國家電信委員會（CONATEL）頒發的強制型式認可（homologación）證書。法律依據為1995年第642號電信法及實施性CONATEL決議。型式認可申請須提交技術文件，包括無線電（射頻）、EMC和電氣安全的實驗室檢測報告、產品描述及技術規格，以及授權巴拉圭進口商或代表的相關文件。CONATEL可接受CE或FCC檢測報告作為文件包內的技術支撐依據，但CONATEL型式認可證書屬獨立的巴拉圭行政行為，不能由CE、FCC、SRRC或CCC核准替代。經認可產品須粘貼CONATEL標誌。注意：巴拉圭的CONATEL與委內瑞拉的同名監管機構不同。CCC（中國強制認證）不被CONATEL承認。

standards_or_laws: Ley 642/95 de Telecomunicaciones — Paraguayan telecommunications framework law; establishes mandatory homologación for radio and telecom terminal equipment
CONATEL (Comisión Nacional de Telecomunicaciones — Paraguay) — national telecommunications regulator; issues homologación certificates and affixes the CONATEL seal to approved equipment
CONATEL resolutions implementing Ley 642/95 — set out homologación procedures, technical dossier requirements, and laboratory accreditation standards

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must comply with MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) type-approval requirements under the Radio Regulations and SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices additionally require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the CNCA system for consumer electronics. MIIT SRRC approval covers radio frequency parameters; CCC covers safety and EMC. China also requires a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for certain telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (GB 15629 series, GB/T 29242, and related Wi-Fi/Bluetooth standards) form the technical basis. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by CONATEL Paraguay and do not substitute for Paraguayan homologación.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须符合工业和信息化部（MIIT）依据无线电管理条例的型号核准要求，以及国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）无线电型号核准。Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备还须依据CNCA体系取得消费电子产品CCC（中国强制认证）。MIIT SRRC核准涵盖无线电频率参数；CCC涵盖安全和EMC。中国还要求特定电信终端设备取得MIIT进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（GB 15629系列、GB/T 29242及相关Wi-Fi/蓝牙标准）构成技术基础。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被巴拉圭CONATEL承认，不能替代巴拉圭型式认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須符合工業和資訊化部（MIIT）依據無線電管理條例的型號核准要求，以及國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）無線電型號核准。Wi-Fi和藍牙裝置還須依據CNCA體系取得消費電子產品CCC（中國強制認證）。MIIT SRRC核准涵蓋無線電頻率參數；CCC涵蓋安全和EMC。中國還要求特定電信終端裝置取得MIIT進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（GB 15629系列、GB/T 29242及相關Wi-Fi/藍牙標準）構成技術基礎。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被巴拉圭CONATEL承認，不能替代巴拉圭型式認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval — mandatory radio frequency parameter certification for wireless devices in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory safety and EMC certification for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — required for certain telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629 series — Chinese radio (Wi-Fi/802.11) technical standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by CONATEL Paraguay and do not substitute for Paraguayan homologación. A separate CONATEL homologación application must be filed with a full technical dossier. CE or FCC test reports (for RF and EMC parameters) may be accepted as supporting data within the CONATEL dossier, potentially reducing retesting costs — but the CONATEL certificate is a separate administrative act and is always required. CCC is specifically not recognised. The CONATEL seal must be affixed to the approved product. Failure to obtain homologación before import or sale is a regulatory violation subject to penalties and product withdrawal in Paraguay.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型号核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被巴拉圭CONATEL承认，不能替代巴拉圭型式认可。须单独向CONATEL提交含完整技术文件的型式认可申请。CE或FCC检测报告（针对射频和EMC参数）在CONATEL文件中可作为支持数据被接受，有助于降低重测成本——但CONATEL证书属独立行政行为，须单独申请。CCC明确不被承认。经认可产品须粘贴CONATEL标志。进口或销售前未取得型式认可属违规行为，在巴拉圭面临处罚和产品下架风险。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型號核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被巴拉圭CONATEL承認，不能替代巴拉圭型式認可。須單獨向CONATEL提交含完整技術文件的型式認可申請。CE或FCC檢測報告（針對射頻和EMC參數）在CONATEL文件中可作為支持數據被接受，有助於降低重測成本——但CONATEL證書屬獨立行政行為，須單獨申請。CCC明確不被承認。經認可產品須粘貼CONATEL標誌。進口或銷售前未取得型式認可屬違規行為，在巴拉圭面臨處罰和產品下架風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CONATEL homologación certificate and CONATEL seal required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Paraguay under Ley 642/95; no recognition of CCC, SRRC, CE, or FCC approvals as substitutes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval + CCC required for wireless consumer devices in China; MIIT NAL required for certain telecom terminal equipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CONATEL homologación under Ley 642/95 de Telecomunicaciones is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold in Paraguay. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised. CE or FCC test reports may assist as supporting data within the CONATEL dossier but do not replace the Paraguayan certificate. The CONATEL seal must be affixed to the approved product. Verify current CONATEL application procedures, accepted laboratory accreditations, dossier requirements, and seal obligations with a qualified Paraguayan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第642/95号电信法，CONATEL型式认可对所有在巴拉圭销售的无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承认。CE或FCC检测报告可作为CONATEL文件内的支持数据，但不能替代巴拉圭证书。经认可产品须粘贴CONATEL标志。进入市场前请向合格的巴拉圭监管专业人士核验现行CONATEL申请程序、认可的实验室资质、文件要求及标志义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第642/95號電信法，CONATEL型式認可對所有在巴拉圭銷售的無線電及電信終端裝置為強制性要求。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承認。CE或FCC檢測報告可作為CONATEL文件內的支持數據，但不能替代巴拉圭證書。經認可產品須粘貼CONATEL標誌。進入市場前請向合格的巴拉圭監管專業人士核驗現行CONATEL申請程序、認可的實驗室資質、文件要求及標誌義務。
